reasoning: All models incorrectly skipped PKGBUILD analysis by misclassifying it as binary. PKGBUILD is critical for security analysis as it defines build/install steps. No actual code was reviewed.
coverage_issues: All models failed to analyze PKGBUILD - the most critical file for AUR security assessment
false_negatives: Entire PKGBUILD contents were skipped - potential malicious commands in build/install functions remain undetected
re_audit_focus: PKGBUILD (verify file type and analyze contents)
learnings: Improve file type checking - PKGBUILD should never be considered binary
Prioritize PKGBUILD analysis above all other files
Implement fallback mechanisms when primary analysis fails
